package.name: go2_description
package.description: Unitree Go2 description repackaged for ROS 2 Humble + Gazebo Classic 11. Meshes and kinematics are from the official unitreerobotics/unitree_ros go2_description (ROS 1 / catkin). Phase 1 locks the 12 leg joints into a fixed standing stance and drives the resulting rigid body with a gazebo_ros planar_move plugin on /cmd_vel (a kinematic base, not gait).
